requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug (GSA / IEC 62368-1)

summary.en: Ghana operates at 230 V / 50 Hz with BS 1363 Type G (British-style 3-pin square) as the primary plug standard, with Type D also in use. Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices must be electrically safe for 230 V / 50 Hz operation. GSA adopts IEC / ISO safety standards as the basis for GS standards; compliance with IEC 62368-1 (or applicable GSA GS equivalent for audio/video and IT equipment) is required. Products designed for 100-120 V or fitted with non-Type-G plugs must be adapted or supplied with a compatible plug and safety-tested for 230 V operation.
summary.zh: 加纳采用230V/50Hz供电，以BS 1363 G型（英式三方扁脚）为主要插头标准，D型插头也在使用中。市电供电的无线及物联网设备须满足230V/50Hz工作的电气安全要求。GSA以IEC/ISO安全标准为基础制定GS标准；须符合IEC 62368-1（或适用于音视频及信息技术设备的相应GSA GS标准）。为100-120V设计或配有非G型插头的产品，须进行适配或配备兼容插头，并通过230V工作的安全测试。
summary.zht: 加納採用230V/50Hz供電，以BS 1363 G型（英式三方扁腳）為主要插頭標準，D型插頭也在使用中。市電供電的無線及物聯網裝置須滿足230V/50Hz工作的電氣安全要求。GSA以IEC/ISO安全標準為基礎制定GS標準；須符合IEC 62368-1（或適用於音視頻及資訊技術設備的相應GSA GS標準）。為100-120V設計或配有非G型插頭的產品，須進行適配或配備相容插頭，並通過230V工作的安全測試。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communication equipment — safety, GSA GS basis)
BS 1363 Type G plug standard (230 V / 50 Hz)
Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) GS standards for electrical safety

summary.en: Chinese devices are safety-certified under GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1 with Chinese deviations) as part of CCC mandatory certification. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/I plugs (GB 2099.1). The voltage is close (220 V CN vs 230 V GH) but Chinese products use non-compatible plugs and are not tested for Type G / BS 1363 compatibility. CCC certification covers 220 V; devices must be re-evaluated for 230 V and a Type G plug fitted.
summary.zh: 中国设备依据GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1对应，含中国特有偏差）通过CCC强制认证进行安全认证。中国采用220V/50Hz，使用A/I型插头（GB 2099.1）。电压相近（中国220V vs 加纳230V），但中国产品使用不兼容的插头，且未针对G型/BS 1363兼容性进行测试。CCC认证仅覆盖220V；产品须针对230V重新评估，并安装G型插头。
summary.zht: 中國設備依據GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1對應，含中國特有偏差）通過CCC強制認證進行安全認證。中國採用220V/50Hz，使用A/I型插頭（GB 2099.1）。電壓相近（中國220V vs 加納230V），但中國產品使用不相容的插頭，且未針對G型/BS 1363相容性進行測試。CCC認證僅覆蓋220V；產品須針對230V重新評估，並安裝G型插頭。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety — IEC 62368-1 basis with CN deviations)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for mains-powered IT / AV equipment
GB 2099.1 Type A/I plug (220 V / 50 Hz)

gap.en: Partial gap: voltage difference is small (220 V CN vs 230 V GH) and most power supplies rated 100-240 V are compatible. The material gap is plug type: Chinese Type A/I plugs are incompatible with Ghana Type G sockets. Devices must be supplied with Type G plugs or approved adapters. Safety test data to IEC 62368-1 (GB 4943.1 basis) is technically close but must be re-declared against the applicable GSA GS standard; CCC does not substitute for GSA conformity assessment.
gap.zh: 部分差距：电压差异较小（中国220V vs 加纳230V），大多数标注100-240V的电源适配器均兼容。主要差距在于插头类型：中国A/I型插头与加纳G型插座不兼容。产品须配备G型插头或经批准的转换器。基于IEC 62368-1（GB 4943.1）的安全测试数据在技术上高度一致，但须重新声明符合适用GSA GS标准；CCC不能替代GSA符合性评估。
gap.zht: 部分差距：電壓差異較小（中國220V vs 加納230V），大多數標注100-240V的電源適配器均相容。主要差距在於插頭類型：中國A/I型插頭與加納G型插座不相容。產品須配備G型插頭或經批准的轉換器。基於IEC 62368-1（GB 4943.1）的安全測試數據在技術上高度一致，但須重新聲明符合適用GSA GS標準；CCC不能替代GSA符合性評估。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 safety data is technically close to IEC 62368-1 but does not substitute for GSA conformity assessment. Products must be fitted with a BS 1363 Type G plug and re-evaluated for 230 V operation before sale in Ghana.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC / GB 4943.1安全数据在技术上与IEC 62368-1高度一致，但不能替代GSA符合性评估。产品在加纳销售前须安装BS 1363 G型插头，并针对230V工作重新评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC / GB 4943.1安全數據在技術上與IEC 62368-1高度一致，但不能替代GSA符合性評估。產品在加納銷售前須安裝BS 1363 G型插頭，並針對230V工作重新評估。
